heroHeadline: US Treasury Sanctions 23-Person Global Fentanyl Precursor Network; El Guano's Inner Circle Arrested in Tamazula as El Chapo's Brother Evades Again
heroSubtitle: 638 days since El Mayo's capture — April 24: US Treasury OFAC sanctions 23-person transnational network (India/Guatemala/Mexico) supplying fentanyl precursors to Sinaloa labs. April 23: SEDENA/SEMAR arrest 10 Gente del Guano including right-hand man 'Abel N' in Tamazula (Durango), second operation in two days — El Guano evades for fourth time. El Mayo EDNY sentencing set for May 18. March 2026: lowest Sinaloa homicide count since Sep 2024 (121).
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, La Jornada, CBC News, Excelsior, El Diario del Noroeste, White House ONDCP, DOJ, El Informador, El Imparcial, Latin Times, Zeta Tijuana, NBC Los Angeles, KTLA, Washington Times, NBC Chicago, UPI, US State Department, CNN, Washington Post, CBS News, Expansión Política, La Razón, El Financiero, Latinus, Ejecentral, El Diario de Chihuahua, NTD, Eurasia Review, Ground News
